what_changes_our_mind: 2026 H1 报告 discloses overseas segment GM < 17% (collapsing the +280bps premium toward zero) OR consolidated GM < 16% — either would invalidate the mix-shift accretion mechanism.
tradeable_not_proven_statement: Tradeable, but not proven. Historical base is [E1:direct] (2025 Overseas GM 19.46% vs Domestic GM 16.66%, +280bps, SEGMENT ECONOMICS period 20251231); forward persistence is [E2:proxy] (H1 2026 mix-shift margin-accretion through European localization not yet measured); size capped until 2026 H1 报告 segment disclosure confirms overseas GM holds ≥18% and consolidated GM holds ≥17%.

core_causal_link.link_sentence: The FY2025 segment-disclosed +280bps overseas-vs-domestic GM premium persists into H1 2026 despite ramping European localization capex.
core_causal_link.tier_justification: The HISTORICAL BASE is [E1:direct] — SEGMENT ECONOMICS period 20251231 shows true_gm overseas 19.46% vs domestic 16.66%, isolable not proxy. The FORWARD claim that this persists into H1 2026 is honestly [E2:proxy] — it has not yet printed. To become [E1] requires the 2026 H1 报告 分部信息披露 to disclose overseas segment GM ≥ 18% with disclosed bz_sales and bz_cost (not blended PROXY).
